passwordResetSuccessRoute.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you instructions to reset your password.

passwordResetSuccessful.heading: Forgot password
passwordResetSuccessful.info1: If you have an account with us, we sent you an email with a link to reset your password. If it doesn't arrive, check your spam or resend it.
passwordResetSuccessful.info2: To reset your password, please open your email address and click the reset link.

verifyEmailSuccess.heading: Registration complete
verifyEmailSuccess.description: Your email address has been successfully verified. You can now log in.

verifyEmailSuccessRoute.description: To complete your registration, you need to verify your email address.

verifyEmail.errorTokenNotFound: The verification link was not found. Please request a new one.
verifyEmail.errorTokenExpired: The verification link has expired. Please request a new one.
verifyEmail.errorValidation: The verification link is invalid. Please request a new one.

verifyEmailRequestRoute.description: You need to verify your email address before logging in.

verifyEmailRequest.heading: Email Verification
verifyEmailRequest.info1: You need to verify your email address before logging in.
verifyEmailRequest.info2: Would you like to receive a new verification link?

verifyEmailRequestSuccessRoute.description: You need to verify your email address before logging in.

verifyEmailRequestSuccess.heading: Link sent successfully
verifyEmailRequestSuccess.info1: We have just sent you an email with a confirmation link. If it doesn't arrive, check your spam or resend it.
verifyEmailRequestSuccess.info2: To complete your registration, please open this email and click the verification link.

verifyEmailMissingToken.alertTitle: Unable to Verify Email – Missing Security Token
verifyEmailMissingToken.alertDescription: The security token required for email verification is invalid or has expired. Please sign in again and request a new verification email.
